latex: A dose of a shrinking potion makes a person $50\%$ smaller than they were before they drank it, and eating a growth cake makes a person $50\%$ larger than they were before they ate it. Alice and Chester are both 100 cm tall. Alice drinks 2 doses of shrinking potion, then eats 1 growth cake. Chester eats 2 growth cakes, then drinks 1 dose of shrinking potion. What is the difference in their final heights?
